title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cisco India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cisco India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cisco India South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cisco India South Asia Partners:
Cisco India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cisco India South Asia Partners!
